text: User: ok, give me ideas, suggestions, etc -- yes, who would become human-only [...] - Make `who` always human-formatted, never XML, and never cursor-mutating. Agent invocation should fail with guidance to use `my session`. [...] I’ll keep `who --expired` for now because the merged management TUI intentionally lists alive local sessions, while `--expired` still owns resumable dead/old sessions. I won’t fold in the unconfirmed `--self` or `pty-wrap-me` naming cleanup.
